announcement.text: Welcome to GMS Church Kuala Lumpur  ·  A Cell-based Church that is Apostolic and Prophetic  ·  Join us every Sunday

about.tagline: GMS Church Kuala Lumpur is a cell-based church that is apostolic and prophetic — carrying the same vision of GMS Indonesia to Kuala Lumpur.
about.body: GMS Church Kuala Lumpur is a branch of GMS Church Indonesia, carrying the same vision and spiritual DNA across borders. We are a cell-based church rooted in apostolic and prophetic foundations, called to make disciples and build lasting community in Malaysia.

visionMission.vision: A Cell-Based Church That Is Apostolic and Prophetic
visionMission.mission: 1,000 Strong Local Churches and 1,000,000 Disciples of Christ

eaglekidz.name: Eaglekidz
eaglekidz.tagline: Raising up the next generation in faith and the love of God.

aog.name: Army of God (AOG)
aog.tagline: Equipping teens and youth to be soldiers of God's Kingdom.

family.name: Family Service
family.tagline: Worship together as a family. Everyone is welcome.

pastor.label: Local Pastor
pastor.name: Ps. Oscar Andi
pastor.bio: Pastor Oscar Andi leads GMS Church Kuala Lumpur with a heart for people and a passion for building the Kingdom of God in Malaysia. Trained under the apostolic and prophetic culture of GMS Indonesia, he carries a deep conviction that every believer is called to be a disciple-maker. His ministry is marked by love for the local church, a hunger for the presence of God, and a commitment to see lives transformed.

giving.heading: Support the Work
giving.intro: Tithing and offering are not obligations — they are acts of worship and trust. As we give, we participate in God's work and open our hands to receive His blessing.
giving.quote: Each of you should give what you have decided in your heart to give, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver. — 2 Corinthians 9:7

connectGroup.heading: Connect Group
connectGroup.body: Connect Group is the small group of GMS, your spiritual family in which you are discipled to become more like Christ. Members encourage one another through testimonies and sharing of the Word. In this home for everyone, we serve each other, pray for one another, and grow together in faith.

cg.heroSub: A Dynamic Home For Every Disciple

whatIs.heading: What is Connect Group (CG)?
whatIs.body1: Connect Group is a small community where you grow in faith, are discipled, and become more like Christ. Here, you are known, loved, and supported.
whatIs.body2: Each CG consists of 6–15 people who meet regularly to worship, study the Word, pray for one another, and share life together. Life is more meaningful when lived together — find your spiritual family at Connect Group GMS KL!

scripture.verse: "And let us consider how to stir up one another to love and good works, not neglecting to meet together, as is the habit of some, but encouraging one another."

whyJoin.heading: Why Should We Be Planted in a CG?
whyJoin.quote: Many people have experienced growing faith, transformed lives, and blessings through Connect Groups.

reasons.title: God's Calling
reasons.desc: To be discipled and to disciple others.

reasons.title: Faith Growth
reasons.desc: Becoming more spiritually mature through intentional discipleship.

reasons.title: Community of Love
reasons.desc: A community that loves one another and is always there for each other.

reasons.title: Spiritual Support
reasons.desc: Mutual support and encouragement through prayer, the Word, and fellowship.

reasons.title: Christlike Service
reasons.desc: Becoming a blessing and Christ's answer for others.

items.name: CG Eaglekidz
items.desc: Childhood is the most important time to lay the right foundation of faith. CG Eaglekidz introduces God's love to children in a fun and meaningful way.

items.name: CG Army of God
items.desc: Young people are like arrows shot by a warrior. The Army of God CG provides the right and healthy environment for young people to grow strong in faith.

items.name: CG Adult
items.desc: The Adult CG provides a place for adults to keep growing in faith, build strong Christ-centered families, and support one another through every stage of life.

steps.title: Fill Out the Form
steps.desc: Complete your personal information and we will help you find the right CG for you.

steps.title: Choose a CG Category
steps.desc: Select the category based on your age so that the CG becomes a community relevant to you.

steps.title: The CG Team Will Contact You
steps.desc: We are ready to welcome you into CG gatherings full of joy, warmth, and togetherness.

steps.title: Join & Grow!
steps.desc: Experience the blessing of community as you grow in faith alongside your CG family.

items.q: What do we do in a Connect Group?
items.a: In a CG, we worship, study the Word, share testimonies, pray for one another, and build meaningful relationships.

items.q: Who can join a Connect Group?
items.a: Anyone! Whether you are new to church or have been attending for years, there is a CG for you.

items.q: Are there any special requirements to join?
items.a: No special requirements — just a willing heart to grow and connect with others.

items.q: Is there a cost to join?
items.a: No, joining a Connect Group is completely free.

items.q: When and how often are CG meetings held?
items.a: Most CGs meet weekly or bi-weekly. Your CG leader will share the exact schedule when you join.

items.q: Where are Connect Groups usually held?
items.a: CGs typically meet in members' homes, creating a warm and personal environment.

items.q: Can I invite friends or family?
items.a: Absolutely! In fact, we encourage you to bring people you care about.

items.q: Can I join more than one Connect Group?
items.a: We recommend starting with one CG to build deep relationships before considering additional groups.

finalCta.heading: Join a CG Today
finalCta.body: Let's be part of a spiritual family that supports one another!

contact.ctaBody: Have a question or want to know more? We'd love to hear from you.
